spec.name: The Bend In The Muddy Sewer
spec.description: This is not your idea of a holiday. You stand in mud up to your knees. It is absolutely inconceivable how all this mud could have been placed here. The pipe leads to the west and south.

south.description: South. There is even more mud that way, incredible! Although it looks like an intersection in the sewer system that leads east and south.

west.description: West. All you can see, is that the pipe leads into a bend that goes north. But there is less mud in that direction, however odd that sounds.

extra_descs.description: It is as dark as tar and looks like something out of a toilet, on top of that, the smell is absolutely overwhelming.
